name: 故事中的故事（後設揭露）
description: 女主用講故事的方式揭露真相，將觀眾從劇情中抽離出來，意識到他們看的整個故事都是更大復仇計畫的一部分。這種後設手法增加了故事的層次感和餘韻。

examples.drama_title: 【ENG DUB】From Convict to Heiress: The Real Daughter's Revenge
examples.excerpt: Once there was a girl. She lived with her mother depending on each other until one day she saw her mother save her was hit by a car and killed. The girl begged everywhere wanting the murderer to be punished. But all the lawyers refused to seek justice for the girl's mother until one day the girl discovered that this person had a missing daughter.
